creator.name: Creator
creator.description: Builders, makers, inventors—those who shape things that last.
creator.mechanicalEffects: Choose one Calling; pre-Visitation Scions should pick a Calling that matches a Favored Calling of the eventual divine parent (Appendix 2, Origin p. 170 intro). Knack lists expand by tier in Pandora’s Box / later books.
creator.source: Scion_Origin_(Revised_Download).pdf, Callings pp. 98–99; SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf (Knacks by Calling)

guardian.name: Guardian
guardian.description: Protectors who stand between harm and what they value.
guardian.mechanicalEffects: See creator entry for Calling match guidance at Origin tier.

healer.name: Healer
healer.description: Those who mend bodies, minds, and communities.
healer.mechanicalEffects: See creator entry for Calling match guidance at Origin tier.

hunter.name: Hunter
hunter.mechanicalEffects: See creator entry for Calling match guidance at Origin tier.

judge.name: Judge
judge.description: Arbiters who weigh truth, debt, and consequence.
judge.mechanicalEffects: See creator entry for Calling match guidance at Origin tier.

leader.name: Leader
leader.description: Those who organize, inspire, and bear responsibility for others.
leader.mechanicalEffects: See creator entry for Calling match guidance at Origin tier.

liminal.name: Liminal
liminal.description: Boundary-walkers between states, places, and identities.
liminal.mechanicalEffects: See creator entry for Calling match guidance at Origin tier.

lover.name: Lover
lover.description: Those driven by passion, devotion, beauty, or connection.
lover.mechanicalEffects: See creator entry for Calling match guidance at Origin tier.

sage.name: Sage
sage.description: Teachers, students, and problem-solvers through knowledge.
sage.mechanicalEffects: See creator entry for Calling match guidance at Origin tier.

trickster.name: Trickster
trickster.description: Clever operators who bend rules and expectations.
trickster.mechanicalEffects: See creator entry for Calling match guidance at Origin tier.

warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.description: Those who meet conflict head-on as a way of life.
warrior.mechanicalEffects: See creator entry for Calling match guidance at Origin tier.

adversary.name: Adversary
adversary.description: Inverted Lover — obsession with enemies, vendettas, and tearing down what another cherishes. As a Titanic Calling, Adversary antagonizes and teaches through opposition (Saints & Monsters).
adversary.mechanicalEffects: MotM inverted Knacks (pp. 47–49) where listed; Titanic Adversary Knacks (Saints & Monsters Ch. 4, sm_*) in this app; Lover knacks from Pandora’s Box when using MotM twin rules.

corruptor.name: Corruptor
corruptor.description: Inverted Guardian — infiltration and rot until the protected thing becomes an extension of the Corruptor’s will.
corruptor.mechanicalEffects: Mythos Calling; Knacks per Masks of the Mythos.

cosmos.name: Cosmos
cosmos.description: Inverted Sage — knowledge as vast and annihilating as deep space; insight that breaks the witness.
cosmos.mechanicalEffects: Mythos Calling; Knacks per Masks of the Mythos.

defiler.name: Defiler
defiler.description: Inverted Healer — preservation of sickness and corruption so harm spreads farther than the original wound.
defiler.mechanicalEffects: Mythos Calling; Knacks per Masks of the Mythos.

destroyer.name: Destroyer
destroyer.description: Inverted Creator — unmaking, collapse, and end-times appetite using the same primordial forces creation drew on. As a Titanic Calling, Destroyers break structures, challenge order, or embody entropy (Saints & Monsters).
destroyer.mechanicalEffects: MotM inverted Knacks (pp. 47–49) where listed; Titanic Destroyer Knacks (Saints & Monsters Ch. 4, sm_*) in this app; Creator knacks when using MotM twin rules.

monster.name: Monster
monster.description: Myths and legends drip with terrible creatures who swallow the sun, gnaw at the world tree, or eat human flesh — inhuman, grotesque, driven by fear and hunger; some wear pleasing masks or erupt into towering horror (Saints & Monsters). Also used as a Mythos Calling in Masks of the Mythos.
monster.mechanicalEffects: MotM Knacks where printed; Titanic Monster Knacks (Saints & Monsters Ch. 4, sm_*) in this app — includes Monstrous Urge hooks per PDF.

primeval.name: Primeval
primeval.description: Primordial creative and predatory drive tied to life before humanity—spawn, fecundity, and hunger older than culture. As a Titanic Calling, Primeval embodies land, weather, and vast natural forces (Saints & Monsters).
primeval.mechanicalEffects: MotM Knacks where listed; Titanic Primeval Knacks (Saints & Monsters Ch. 4, sm_*) in this app.

torturer.name: Torturer
torturer.description: Inverted Warrior — violence for the sustained infliction of pain, detached from glory or cause.
torturer.mechanicalEffects: Mythos Calling; Knacks per Masks of the Mythos.

tyrant.name: Tyrant
tyrant.description: Inverted Leader — obedience through terror, cultic fealty, and the price of disappointing the overlord. As a Titanic Calling, Tyrant craves power, sycophants, and absolute edicts (Saints & Monsters).
tyrant.mechanicalEffects: MotM inverted Knacks where listed; Titanic Tyrant Knacks (Saints & Monsters Ch. 4, sm_*) in this app; Leader knacks when using MotM twin rules.

outsider.name: Outsider
outsider.description: The stranger at the edge of every story—never quite trusted, never quite cast out, whose presence bends fate and social order in uncomfortable ways (Saints & Monsters).
outsider.mechanicalEffects: Heroic and Immortal Knacks with ids prefixed sm_outsider_* (merged from knacksSaintsMonsters.json) cite the Player’s Guide; confirm full write-ups in Saints & Monsters.

shepherd.name: Shepherd
shepherd.description: Protectors who bind their legend to a Ward—teachers, guardians, and matchmakers who stand between harm and the one they shepherd (Saints & Monsters).
shepherd.mechanicalEffects: Heroic and Immortal Knacks with ids prefixed sm_shepherd_* (merged from knacksSaintsMonsters.json); Ward rules per PDF.
